item.title: January sixth, a date that shall live in infamy
item.description: How can they now whitewash the event? We all saw it. It did not happen in secret. People took over desks and issued threats. They climbed up walls. There was nothing peaceful about it.
item.dc:creator: andy1max11

item.title: Never Forget?
item.description: Today marks the ninth anniversary of the attack on the French satirical magazine Charlie Hebdo (Jan. 7th, 2015).  It was a shock for us at the time and we suddenly realized that even humorists - people who put their finger in the wound and use humor to draw attention to the issues that concern them - are now under attack. Not everything can be said and not everything can be drawn. Not because it means bad publicity or the loss of followers, but because it puts your life at risk. This was an attack on artists and anyone who tells jokes. It was an attack on the free world and everyone who wants to live in it. We will not forget this and we ask you all not to either.
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: Well, I'll be buggered, because the hedgehog surely can't be, at all.

item.title: It can happen to You too!
item.description: There are exactly 302 days until Decision 2024 America's "Christian Nationalists" are on the move and are basically looking to impose the same ideology as the Ayatollah and his cadre of religions fanatics ( just under a slightly different brand) It's up to YOU to stop this dangerous slide towards religious authoritarianism! First things first .... register to vote / check your registration ... vote.org Secondly get involved, here are some handy links https://runforsomething.net/run/candidate-support-system/ https://www.turnoutpac.org/ https://justicedemocrats.com/ https://ballotpedia.org/Election_results,_2022:_Uncontested_races_by_state Why: https://www.axios.com/2023/11/13/trump-loyalists-2024-presidential-election Do your part today to protect DEMOCRACY!
item.dc:creator: theInternetismyplayground

item.title: Alright.... Alright.... Alright....
item.description: Matthew McConaughey does a lot of volunteering with the elderly in the state. At least half of the people he delivers Meals on Wheels to have no idea who he is except that he always has a smile. He seems yo enjoy this a lot.
